title: AnimatedSprite2D
summary: Displays and advances a texture-frame animation from a `Electron2D.AnimatedSprite2D.SpriteFrames` resource.

title: Animation
summary: Stores keyframed value and method-call tracks for `Electron2D.AnimationPlayer`.

title: Animation.InterpolationTypeEnum
summary: Describes how value tracks produce values between neighboring keys.

title: Animation.LoopModeEnum
summary: Describes how playback behaves when it reaches the end of the resource.

title: Animation.TrackTypeEnum
summary: Describes the supported animation track kinds.

title: AnimationLibrary
summary: Stores named `Electron2D.Animation` resources for `Electron2D.AnimationPlayer`.

title: AnimationPlayer
summary: Plays `Electron2D.Animation` resources against nodes in the scene tree.

title: Area2D
summary: Provides an Electron2D 2D area node for overlap and influence queries.

title: AtlasTexture
summary: Provides an Electron2D texture that draws a region of another `Electron2D.Texture2D`.

title: AudioServer
summary: Provides process-wide audio device, bus and voice playback state.

title: AudioServer.SpeakerMode
summary: Identifies the speaker layout used by the active audio output.

title: AudioStream
summary: Provides the base resource for audio data that can be played by audio nodes.

title: AudioStreamPlayer
summary: Plays an `Electron2D.AudioStream` without positional attenuation.

title: AudioStreamPlayer2D
summary: Plays an `Electron2D.AudioStream` as a sound source in 2D space.

title: BaseButton
summary: Provides shared input, focus and signal behavior for button controls.

title: BaseButton.ActionModeEnum
summary: Identifies when a button emits its activation signal.

title: BoxContainer
summary: Arranges direct child controls in a single horizontal or vertical line.

title: BoxContainerAlignmentMode
summary: Describes how a `Electron2D.BoxContainer` positions children when free space remains.

title: Button
summary: Provides a text button control.

title: Callable
summary: Represents the callable value type.

title: CallbackTweener
summary: Calls a `Electron2D.Callable` when a tween sequence reaches this step.

title: Camera2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D 2D camera node for selecting the visible canvas region.

title: CanvasItem
summary: Provides the Electron2D base node for items that can be drawn on a 2D canvas.

title: CanvasLayer
summary: Provides an Electron2D node that renders 2D descendants on an independent canvas layer.

title: CapsuleShape2D
summary: Provides a capsule-shaped 2D physics resource.

title: CenterContainer
summary: Places direct child controls around the center of this container.

title: CharacterBody2D
summary: Provides a 2D character body moved directly by user code.

title: CharacterBody2D.MotionModeEnum
summary: Identifies how collisions are classified during slide movement.

title: CharacterBody2D.PlatformOnLeaveEnum
summary: Identifies how platform velocity should be applied when leaving a platform.

title: CheckBox
summary: Provides a toggle button with a check indicator and text.

title: CircleShape2D
summary: Provides a circular 2D physics shape resource.

title: Collections.Array
summary: Stores an ordered mutable list of `Electron2D.Variant` values.

title: Collections.Dictionary
summary: Stores mutable key/value pairs where both keys and values are `Electron2D.Variant`.

title: CollisionObject2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D base node for 2D objects that own a physics server RID.

title: CollisionShape2D
summary: Provides a node that attaches a `Electron2D.Shape2D` to a collision object.

title: Color
summary: Represents the color value type.

title: ConcavePolygonShape2D
summary: Provides a concave polygon 2D physics shape resource backed by line segments.

title: ConnectFlags
summary: Identifies values used by the connect flags API.

title: Container
summary: Provides the base control for nodes that arrange direct child controls.

title: Control
summary: Provides the Electron2D base node for 2D user interface controls.

title: ConvexPolygonShape2D
summary: Provides a convex polygon 2D physics shape resource.

title: DisplayServer
summary: Provides display, orientation and virtual keyboard state.

title: DisplayServer.ScreenOrientation
summary: Identifies a requested screen orientation.

title: DisplayServer.VirtualKeyboardType
summary: Identifies the requested virtual keyboard layout.

title: Error
summary: Identifies values used by the error API.

title: ExportAttribute
summary: Marks a script field or property as an exported value that can be serialized and shown by editor tooling.

title: FocusMode
summary: Identifies how a `Electron2D.Control` can receive keyboard, gamepad or mouse focus.

title: Font
summary: Provides the Electron2D base resource for text layout and drawing.

title: GridContainer
summary: Arranges direct child controls into rows and columns.

title: GrowDirection
summary: Describes which side of a `Electron2D.Control` moves when the control must grow to satisfy its minimum size.

title: HBoxContainer
summary: Arranges direct child controls horizontally.

title: HorizontalAlignment
summary: Defines horizontal text alignment values used by Electron2D text drawing APIs.

title: ImageTexture
summary: Provides an immutable image-backed 2D texture loaded from a PNG file.

title: Input
summary: Provides process-wide action input state.

title: InputEvent
summary: Base class for Electron2D input events delivered to `Electron2D.Node._Input(Electron2D.InputEvent)`.

title: InputEventAction
summary: Represents a direct action input event.

title: InputEventFromWindow
summary: Base class for input events that originate from a platform window.

title: InputEventJoypadButton
summary: Represents a gamepad button press or release.

title: InputEventJoypadMotion
summary: Represents a gamepad axis motion event.

title: InputEventKey
summary: Represents a keyboard key press, release, echo, or text input scalar value.

title: InputEventMouse
summary: Base class for mouse input events.

title: InputEventMouseButton
summary: Represents a mouse button press, release, or wheel step.

title: InputEventMouseMotion
summary: Represents a mouse movement event.

title: InputEventScreenDrag
summary: Represents a screen touch drag event.

title: InputEventScreenTouch
summary: Represents a screen touch press, release or cancel event.

title: InputEventWithModifiers
summary: Base class for input events that carry keyboard modifier state.

title: InputMap
summary: Stores input actions and their input event bindings.

title: IntervalTweener
summary: Consumes time inside a tween sequence without changing objects.

title: ItemList
summary: Displays a selectable flat list of text and optional icon items.

title: ItemList.SelectModeEnum
summary: Identifies how many items can be selected at the same time.

title: JoyAxis
summary: Identifies a normalized gamepad axis.

title: JoyButton
summary: Identifies a standardized gamepad button.

title: Key
summary: Identifies a keyboard key in the Electron2D input event model.

title: KeyLocation
summary: Identifies the left or right location of a keyboard key.

title: KinematicCollision2D
summary: Holds collision data returned by 2D body movement methods.

title: Label
summary: Provides the Electron2D control for drawing a single line of plain text.

title: LineEdit
summary: Provides a single-line text editing control.

title: MarginContainer
summary: Places direct child controls inside theme-defined margins.

title: Material
summary: Provides the Electron2D base resource for visual materials.

title: Mathf
summary: Represents the mathf type.

title: MouseButton
summary: Identifies a mouse button or mouse wheel direction in the Electron2D input model.

title: MouseButtonMask
summary: Provides bit flags for mouse buttons held during a mouse event.

title: MouseFilter
summary: Identifies how a `Electron2D.Control` receives and consumes mouse input.

title: NinePatchRect
summary: Provides a texture-backed UI rectangle with nine-patch margins.

title: NinePatchRect.AxisStretchModeEnum
summary: Identifies how the center segment of a nine-patch axis is expanded.

title: Node
summary: Represents the node type.

title: Node2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D 2D transform node used by sprites and future 2D nodes.

title: NodePath
summary: Represents the node path value type.

title: Object
summary: Represents the object type.

title: PackedScene
summary: Represents the packed scene type.

title: Panel
summary: Provides a rectangular UI control used as a simple visual panel.

title: PhysicsBody2D
summary: Provides the base node for physical 2D bodies that participate in collision queries.

title: PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D
summary: Provides direct 2D physics queries for a `Electron2D.World2D`.

title: PhysicsMaterial
summary: Provides an Electron2D physics material resource for 2D body collision behavior.

title: PhysicsPointQueryParameters2D
summary: Stores parameters for `Electron2D.PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.IntersectPoint(Electron2D.PhysicsPointQueryParameters2D,System.Int32)`.

title: PhysicsRayQueryParameters2D
summary: Stores parameters for `Electron2D.PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.IntersectRay(Electron2D.PhysicsRayQueryParameters2D)`.

title: PhysicsServer2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D server boundary for low-level 2D physics objects.

title: PhysicsServer2D.ProcessInfo
summary: Identifies a physics process statistic that can be queried from the server.

title: PhysicsServer2D.ShapeType
summary: Identifies the shape resource kind stored by the physics server.

title: PhysicsServer2D.SpaceParameter
summary: Identifies a configurable parameter of a physics space.

title: PhysicsShapeQueryParameters2D
summary: Stores parameters for `Electron2D.PhysicsDirectSpaceState2D.IntersectShape(Electron2D.PhysicsShapeQueryParameters2D,System.Int32)`.

title: PopupMenu
summary: Displays a temporary menu of command items.

title: ProcessMode
summary: Identifies how a `Electron2D.Node` participates in scene-tree callbacks while its `Electron2D.SceneTree` is paused.

title: ProgressBar
summary: Provides a read-only visual progress indicator.

title: PropertyTweener
summary: Tweens a public property or field on an object.

title: RandomNumberGenerator
summary: Represents the random number generator type.

title: Range
summary: Provides a numeric value with minimum, maximum, step and ratio state.

title: RayCast2D
summary: Provides an Electron2D 2D raycast node.

title: Rect2
summary: Represents the rect2 value type.

title: Rect2I
summary: Represents the rect2 i value type.

title: RectangleShape2D
summary: Provides a rectangular 2D physics shape resource.

title: RefCounted
summary: Represents the ref counted type.

title: RenderingServer
summary: Provides the Electron2D server boundary for rendering capabilities.

title: RenderingServer.RenderingFeature
summary: Identifies a renderer feature that can be queried at runtime.

title: RenderingServer.RenderingProfile
summary: Identifies the active renderer profile.

title: Resource
summary: Represents the resource type.

title: ResourceUid
summary: Manages stable unique identifiers for resource paths in an Electron2D project.

title: Rid
summary: Represents the rid value type.

title: RigidBody2D
summary: Provides an Electron2D rigid 2D physics body.

title: RigidBody2D.CenterOfMassModeEnum
summary: Identifies how the body's center of mass should be selected.

title: RigidBody2D.FreezeModeEnum
summary: Identifies how a frozen rigid body should interact with the simulation.

title: SceneTree
summary: Represents the scene tree type.

title: ScrollContainer
summary: Clips and scrolls direct child controls inside a viewport-sized rectangle.

title: ScrollHintMode
summary: Describes which scroll hint edges a `Electron2D.ScrollContainer` may expose.

title: ScrollMode
summary: Describes how a `Electron2D.ScrollContainer` exposes scrolling on one axis.

title: SegmentShape2D
summary: Provides a finite line segment 2D physics shape resource.

title: Shader
summary: Provides the Electron2D resource for a canvas shader source.

title: Shader.Mode
summary: Identifies the shader mode.

title: ShaderMaterial
summary: Provides the Electron2D material resource backed by a custom `Electron2D.ShaderMaterial.Shader`.

title: Shape2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D base resource for 2D physics shapes.

title: SignalAttribute
summary: Marks a script delegate declaration as a signal that can be registered on an Electron2D object and emitted through `Electron2D.Object.EmitSignal(System.String,System.Object[])`.

title: SizeFlags
summary: Describes how a `Electron2D.Control` uses space allocated by a parent `Electron2D.Container`.

title: Slider
summary: Provides an editable horizontal slider control.

title: Sprite2D
summary: Provides a node that submits a 2D texture for drawing.

title: SpriteFrames
summary: Stores named texture-frame animations for `Electron2D.AnimatedSprite2D`.

title: SpriteFrames.LoopModeEnum
summary: Describes how an animation loops at its boundaries.

title: StaticBody2D
summary: Provides an Electron2D static 2D physics body.

title: StringName
summary: Represents the string name value type.

title: StyleBox
summary: Provides the base resource for drawing themed UI boxes.

title: StyleBoxFlat
summary: Provides a rectangle style box with a fill color and optional borders.

title: TabContainer
summary: Displays direct child controls as selectable tab pages.

title: TabContainer.AlignmentModeEnum
summary: Identifies how tabs are aligned inside the tab header.

title: TabContainer.TabPositionEnum
summary: Identifies where the tab header is placed.

title: Texture2D
summary: Provides the Electron2D base resource for 2D textures.

title: TextureButton
summary: Provides a button that draws textures for its visual states.

title: TextureButton.StretchModeEnum
summary: Identifies how a texture button scales its selected texture.

title: TextureRect
summary: Provides a control that draws a texture inside its rectangle.

title: TextureRect.ExpandModeEnum
summary: Identifies how texture size contributes to minimum size.

title: TextureRect.StretchModeEnum
summary: Identifies how a texture is drawn inside the control rectangle.

title: Theme
summary: Provides a reusable resource for styling UI controls.

title: TileData
summary: Stores per-tile metadata consumed by `Electron2D.TileMapLayer`.

title: TileMapLayer
summary: Provides a single 2D tilemap layer.

title: TileSet
summary: Stores tile sources and shared tilemap settings.

title: TileSetAtlasSource
summary: Provides a tile set source backed by a texture atlas.

title: TileSetSource
summary: Provides the base resource for entries stored inside a `Electron2D.TileSet`.

title: ToolAttribute
summary: Marks a C# script class as capable of explicit editor-time execution.

title: Transform2D
summary: Represents the transform2 d value type.

title: Translation
summary: Stores translated messages for one locale.

title: TranslationServer
summary: Provides process-wide translation lookup and locale selection.

title: Tree
summary: Displays selectable `Electron2D.TreeItem` objects in a hierarchy.

title: Tree.SelectModeEnum
summary: Identifies how tree item selection is interpreted.

title: TreeItem
summary: Stores one row of data inside a `Electron2D.Tree` control.

title: Tween
summary: Runs sequential property, interval and callback animation steps.

title: Tween.EaseType
summary: Lists how a transition curve is applied to normalized time.

title: Tween.TransitionType
summary: Lists transition curves available to tween interpolation.

title: Tweener
summary: Represents one step in a `Electron2D.Tween` sequence.

title: VBoxContainer
summary: Arranges direct child controls vertically.

title: Variant
summary: Stores one value from the closed Electron2D 0.1-preview Variant type set.

title: Variant.Type
summary: Identifies the type currently stored in a `Electron2D.Variant`.

title: Vector2
summary: Represents the vector2 value type.

title: Vector2I
summary: Represents the vector2 i value type.

title: VerticalAlignment
summary: Identifies the vertical alignment used by controls that draw text.

title: Viewport
summary: Provides the Electron2D viewport node for 2D camera selection and canvas transforms.

title: ViewportTexture
summary: Provides an Electron2D dynamic texture for the contents of a `Electron2D.Viewport`.

title: World2D
summary: Provides access to the 2D world associated with a canvas item.
